nodes.label: GENIUS Act (Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins Act) signed into law on July 18, 2025, requires 1:1 reserve backing and federal licensing for payment stablecoin issuers

metadata.full_text: GENIUS Act (Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins Act) signed into law on July 18, 2025, requires 1:1 reserve backing and federal licensing for payment stablecoin issuers

nodes.label: GENIUS Act requires 100% reserve backing (1:1 ratio) with high-quality liquid assets including: cash, Treasury securities ≤93 days, insured deposits, overnight repos, and government MMFs

metadata.full_text: GENIUS Act requires 100% reserve backing (1:1 ratio) with high-quality liquid assets including: cash, Treasury securities ≤93 days, insured deposits, overnight repos, and government MMFs
